generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "360-degree obstacle detection sensor using Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance RealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Spatial perception sensor using Intel RealSense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring ego vehicle speed for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed regulation"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance VehicleMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for propulsion"
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, RealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data used for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed depth camera data for spatial perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed measurements for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurements for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering point cloud data to detect objects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for state estimation of detected objects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component responsible for collecting and preprocessing sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component storing processed data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication using UDP and Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CloudComputeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based infrastructure for offloading ACC processing tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ControlPanelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control panel for remote management of ACC functions"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for low-latency communication and safety-critical system integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and modeling of ACC systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks via user interface with reporting capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, DetectedObjectsInsight, ProjectedPathsInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system processing (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation commands) from on-board ECUs to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, ActuationCommandInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling operators to control ACC functions (enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking) and developers to troubleshoot using collected data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, AdjustSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle speed measurement for monitoring"
]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle measurement for vehicle control"
]

instance DetectedObjectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from sensor data for obstacle avoidance"
]

instance ProjectedPathsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving paths based on current vehicle state and detected objects"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance ActuationCommandInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated commands for vehicle actuation (throttle, brake)"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Modify desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Perform emergency braking maneuver"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, RealSenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderESC, SteeringServo, VehicleMotor, DataCollectionEnabler, DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ROS2Middleware
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataStorageEnabler, CloudComputeEnabler, VisualizationEnabler, ControlPanelEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserInterfaceFE
]

instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface Frontend components for 3D Visualization and Control Panel"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor and steering actuation are generated by the Controlling FE and processed via the Data Translation component before transmission over Wi-Fi using UDP."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, ensuring coordination between devices for computation offloading and temporal consistency across physical and digital components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages containing ROS2 nodes. The system organizes FEs into three entities: Physical Twin Entity (handling resource-specific and general automotive functions), Digital Twin Entity (data management), and User Entity (user-facing components), with each entity deployed on distinct hardware. This structure deviates from ISO 23247 by extending the Physical Twin Entity's role beyond the standard's OME."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal software components communicate via ROS2, while inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity is deployed on separate hardware components, including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers. Ego vehicle state data is stored on an external device, ensuring edge deployment with distributed hardware resources."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system references ISO 23247's four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. However, substantial deviations exist; the standard's reference architecture suggests OPC Unified Architecture as a possible implementation choice, but the system utilizes ROS2 for network communication as specified in Section IV.C."
]
